summary: Dashboard shows proper authenticated UI structure with billing estimate, usage metrics, and empty indexes state. Main concern is the dark sidebar navigation which conflicts with the brand palette consistency requirement, though core functionality and content layout are correct.

violations.description: The left sidebar navigation uses a dark navy/black background (#1f2937 or similar) instead of the required diner palette colors. This creates visual brand discontinuity between public and authenticated surfaces.

actions: Update sidebar navigation background to use diner palette colors (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea)
Ensure sidebar text and borders follow diner palette ink colors (#1f1b18)
Verify navigation links use proper diner accent colors when active/hover
